name: Pineapple Sandwich Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the cherry juice to the creamed cheese and blend until smooth.
2. Mix in the chopped cherries.
3. Place 4 pineapple slices on a bed of lettuce on a serving plate.
4. Spread some cheese mixture on each slice of pineapple.
5. Place another slice of pineapple on top of each.
6. In the center of each, add a spoonful of Miracle Whip.
7. Garnish with a cherry wedge.
